news.title: Bitcoin tends to outperform gold and stocks after global shocks, Mercado Bitcoin finds
news.summary: The study analyzed 60-day windows after economic or geopolitical shocks and found that Bitcoin posted stronger returns than gold and the S&P 500 in each period.

news.title: Ex-UK Chancellor backs bitcoin as alternative to failing systems
news.summary: Kwasi Kwarteng reflects on current UK market turmoil, fiscal “doom loop,” and his move into bitcoin with Stack BTC.

news.title: Digital asset treasuries must now earn their keep
news.summary: For treasuries to do so and stay competitive, Kiernan unpacks three broad strategies that are emerging.
